LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE DEMAND FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF SEEKS PUNITIVE DAMAGES AT PARAGRAPH 14(A)(2) OF THE COMPLAINT. AS A MATTER OF LAW, PLAINTIFF CANNOT RECOVER PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINST THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA. SEE GOV'T CODE SECTIONS 811.2 AND 818. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. (ONE ORDER SIGNED FOR BOTH MOTIONS.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Continued To Jul-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Derek J. Haynes, Esq. of Porter Scott, Tel. 916.929.1481, for defendant and moving party, by Court Call;
Frederick Smith, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling modified as follows: DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 25 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Derek J. Haynes, Esq. of Porter Scott, Tel. 916.929.1481, for defendant and moving party, by Court Call;
Frederick Smith, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE the demand for punitive damages is granted without leave to amend. Plaintiff seeks punitive damages at paragraph 14(a)(2) of the Complaint. As a matter of law, plaintiff cannot recover punitive damages against The Regents of the University of California. See Gov't Code sections 811.2 and 818. No opposition was filed. (One order signed for both motions.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
